name: Linear
description: Linear project and issue tracking for software teams

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Linear
2. Go to Settings → API
3. Create a Personal API key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Linear → Settings → API → Personal API keys → Create key
